text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
WOW! What an epiphany! Sometimes I scare
myself with how smart I am!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Combining daily cleaning with training... This is
killing two birds with one stone AT ITS FINEST!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now I just need to think about how to do it!
Hmmm, how can I clean in a way that'll boost my
Bakushin?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hm? Hey, you! Do you have any suggestions?
choice_data_list: Boost your speed by wiping the floor!

Boost your power by tidying the reference
room!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Speed?! You mean wiping the floor will lead me
to even greater Bakushin speed?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What a fantastic idea! I'll get on that right away!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! So if I Bakushin while I tidy stuff, it'll lead
me to having an even more powerful Bakushin?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Raaaah! Leave it to me! Making things nice and
tidy is a piece of cake for a genius like me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A series of truly frightening noises follows in
Sakura Bakushin O's wake, but at least it looks
like her problem's solved now.
